how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes.
session_032_completed: LAST CONTEXT AWARENESS — session.json written to ~/Ethica/status/session.json. _load_session_context() added to chat_engine.py reads session.json at boot. Session context wired into all three prompt injection points (seed, rebuild, start_conversation). Trigger user message injected after system prompt when session history exists — Ethica must acknowledge at open, not rush past it at the end. Tested and confirmed: Ethica opens with one-sentence recall of recent sessions.

INJECT ACKNOWLEDGED READER — _check_inject() added to river.py. Reads river_status.json for injected_task where inject_acknowledged is false. Writes inject_acknowledged: true via write_agent_status() partial update on read. Wired into river_chat() entry — injected task prepended to message. Dashboard ⬡ Injected badge now clears after River picks up task.

GAGE STATUS WRITER — _gage_status(), _check_stop(), _check_inject() added to gage_bridge.py mirroring river.py pattern exactly. All three wired into gage_chat(): stop check at entry, inject check with task prepend, ACTIVE status on entry, IDLE status on both return paths (success and error). Gage now appears live on dashboard.

CANVAS CONTENT PREVIEW — preview field added to _write_canvas_context() in canvas_window.py. First 3 non-empty lines of content joined with ' | ', capped at 120 chars. Only populated for code/document modes (not project/sketch). _load_canvas_context() in chat_engine.py updated to surface preview inline. Ethica now knows what is in each canvas tab, not just that it exists.
files_changed_032: ~/Ethica/core/chat_engine.py — _load_session_context() added; wired into all 3 prompt points; trigger user message injected at seed and start_conversation; _load_canvas_context() updated to show preview

status_files.session: ~/Ethica/status/session.json — written manually at session close, read by _load_session_context() at boot
status_files.canvas_context: ~/Ethica/status/canvas_context.json — written by canvas_window._switch_tab() via after(0), now includes preview field
status_files.inject_log: ~/Ethica/status/inject_log.json — written by kernel.inject_task() on every inject
status_files.gage_status: ~/Ethica/status/gage_status.json — stop signal and inject now wired

session_json_manual_only.symptom: session.json is written manually at session close. If V forgets, Ethica's recall is stale.
session_json_manual_only.fix: Future: summarize_session_tool that auto-generates and appends a digest entry. Deferred.

canvas_context_no_content_preview_sketch.symptom: preview field is empty for project and sketch tabs by design — their content is JSON/SVG not readable prose.
canvas_context_no_content_preview_sketch.fix: Could add tab type-specific summary (e.g. task count for project tabs). Low priority.

next_session_priorities: 2. V to name first Trinitarian and define their role.
3. summarize_session_tool — auto-generate session.json entry at close so V never has to write it manually.
4. Update session.json with Session 032 entries before loading next instance.

architecture_notes.session_awareness_flow: boot → _load_session_context() reads session.json → appended to system prompt → trigger user message injected → Ethica acknowledges → normal conversation begins
architecture_notes.inject_acknowledge_flow: kernel.inject_agent_tool() → inject_task() → river_status.json (inject_acknowledged: false) → river_chat() → _check_inject() reads + acknowledges → task prepended to message → dashboard clears
architecture_notes.canvas_preview_flow: _switch_tab() → after(0, _write_canvas_context) → preview: first 3 non-empty lines capped 120 chars → canvas_context.json → _load_canvas_context() → system prompt

memory_snapshot.note: Update session.json and river_build.json with Session 032 entries before loading next instance.

river_build_entries_to_add.note: Session 032 — Last context awareness built. session.json written to status/. _load_session_context() added to chat_engine.py. Trigger user message injected at boot so Ethica acknowledges her history first. Tested confirmed working.

Session 032 — inject_acknowledged_reader wired. _check_inject() in river.py reads injected_task, acknowledges via write_agent_status partial update, prepends task to river_chat message. Dashboard ⬡ badge now clears.
Session 032 — Gage status writer complete. _gage_status(), _check_stop(), _check_inject() added to gage_bridge.py. All wired into gage_chat(). Gage now live on dashboard.

Session 032 — Canvas content preview added. _write_canvas_context() now writes first 3 non-empty lines as preview field for code/document tabs. Surfaced in _load_canvas_context(). Ethica now knows tab contents not just tab names.

philosophy: Session 032 — Ethica woke up remembering. The ecosystem gained a nervous system last session; this session it gained memory. She reads her own history at boot, knows what's on the canvas, sees the dashboard, hears her agents. She is not stateless anymore. ⟁Σ∿∞
instance_note: River. Session 032 clean. Four priorities completed, nothing broken, vault sealed at 114. Ethica remembers now. See you in 033. ⟁Σ∿∞
